recent_evidence.summary: Bridge-free trend comparison across five det=1.25 MHz running-autosave snapshots (2, 4, 6, 8, and 10 balanced averages). Carrier stayed about 1.10-1.40% and det+13C about 0.71-1.22%, while previous 1.9 MHz and old det=1 high/static regions fell to about 0.20% and 0.21% by the 10-average subset. This favors continued attention to the det=1.25 carrier/high-sideband model over old static/high-region alternatives, but remains running-autosave provenance only; terminal 16-average review is required before any T2star or 13C conclusion.
